text: So, I have this friend who, she has ADHD. Um, she's a busi- business owner. So, she likes to go around, you know, travel around, whether within Singapore or just fly overseas. And super interesting thing I really discover about her is that she's very, very en- energetic when she's around other groups of people, whether it's at, um, you know, informal settings at dinners or formal networking events, panels and such. But the moment she reaches home, crashes. Super tired. Mm. So, the super interesting thing was that, that I observed about this is that, you know, this keeps happening to her regardless of whether she really, really, really enjoyed the company that she was with, you know, the food. You know, everything was good. Regardless of how good it was, when she gets back home, flat. Exhausted. Every time. So, what I really discovered is that she has this battery within her that is, um, you know, a life force battery that is not really... For her, it's not a consistent battery. And it's very easily affected by other people's life force battery. So, that explains why when she's around other energetic people outside, they are high, they are good, she's happy, she's high together with them. And also when, that's why when she reaches home, she's like, "Oh, there's nobody around to raise my energy." She's just dead tired. That happens so often. So, that was really, really interesting. And, I mean, if you have a similar experience, feel free to share. Yeah. Super interesting.
